name: tokegon-weather-app
description: Tokegon weather app with React/TypeScript frontend and Node/Express backend

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.setup-and-start: npm run install:all && npm run build:all && npm run start
scripts.docker:run: docker build -t tokegon-weather-app . && docker run -p 8080:8080 --name tokegon-weather-app tokegon-weather-app
scripts.docker:stop: docker stop tokegon-weather-app && docker rm tokegon-weather-app
